diagrams.title: Hash Table with Separate Chaining
diagrams.description: Shows hash table array with linked lists at each bucket for collision handling
elements: Chains showing collisions at same indices
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Separate Chaining stores multiple elements at same hash index using linked lists.

diagrams.title: Linear Probing Insertion Example
diagrams.description: Step-by-step insertion showing probe sequence and clustering formation
elements: Empty slots, occupied slots, collision points marked
diagrams.purpose: Understand Linear Probing mechanism and observe how primary clustering develops.

diagrams.title: Open Addressing Probe Sequences Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares probe paths for Linear, Quadratic, and Double Hashing for same key
elements: Double hash path varies by secondary function
Visual path lines showing different traversal patterns
diagrams.purpose: Compare how different open addressing methods handle collisions differently.
